title: PRD: SSO/SAML support
text:
# PRD — SSO/SAML support
Product area: User Management & SSO
Status: Draft
Author: Product team

## Problem
Customers repeatedly request sso/saml support. This appears in support tickets and NPS feedback for the User Management & SSO area.

## Proposed solution
Implement sso/saml support with configuration in workspace settings.

## Success metrics
Reduce User Management & SSO-related complaints by 30%; adoption > 40% in 60 days.

## Priority
Committed for next quarter.
